pi_items.source: setup_task.sh SQL UPDATE and task description

privileged_info_summary: Confirmed that the prerequisite Invoice ('INV-ECO-994'), Contact ('Alex Mercer'), and Product ('Solar Pathway Lights (Pack of 6)') are synthetically injected via SQL updates in setup_task.sh. Verified that the expected invoice status ('Cancel'), ticket status ('Closed'), and ticket priority ('High') exactly match the explicit task description instructions. Additionally, discovered that the task is defective because 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, making the task unscorable.
